name: Calculadora Regra 72
desc: Calcule Years to double = 72 / Interest rate (%). Exemplo: Interest rate 6% annual = Investment doubles in ≈ 12 years. Calculadora gratuita e precisa, sem registo.
description: Calcule Years to double = 72 / Interest rate (%). Exemplo: Interest rate 6% annual = Investment doubles in ≈ 12 years. Calculadora gratuita e precisa, sem registo.
seo_description: Calcule Years to double = 72 / Interest rate (%). Exemplo: Interest rate 6% annual = Investment doubles in ≈ 12 years. Calculadora gratuita e precisa, sem regis
example_label: Estimating how long it takes to double money at 8% annual return using the Rule of 72.
result_context: At {tasa_interes}% return, your investment will double in approximately anos_duplicar of {anos_duplicar} years.
mistakes: Using Rule of 72 for very high interest rates (becomes less accurate)
Not adjusting for inflation when calculating real doubling time
Forgetting that the rule assumes compound interest, not simples
